problem id: 16e73f0e
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) AND SHR(4)

examples:
  00001010 -> 00000000
  00001000 -> 00000000
  11000011 -> 00000000
  00001011 -> 00000000
  11110011 -> 00001100
  01011100 -> 00000101
  01000111 -> 00000000
  10001011 -> 00000000
  00010000 -> 00000000
  10100011 -> 00001000

query: 10011100
predicted answer: 00000001
